name: mola_msgs
description: ROS message, services, and actions used in other MOLA packages.

MapLoad.description: This service requests loading a map from a given map file(s).
MapLoad.raw:
# This service requests loading a map from a given map file(s).

# Request.
# File relative or absolute path. Do not add any file extension, since maps
# may be loaded/saved to several files depending on implementation.
string map_path
---
# Result. False if there was no MOLA map module accepting this request, or
# there was an error loading the map.
bool success
# In case of no success, here is a human-readable error reason.
string error_message

MapSave.description: This service requests saving the current map to a given map file(s).
MapSave.raw:
# This service requests saving the current map to a given map file(s).

# Request.
# File relative or absolute path. Do not add any file extension, since maps
# may be loaded/saved to several files depending on implementation.
string map_path
---
# Result. False if there was no MOLA map module accepting this request, or
# there was an error saving the map.
bool success
# In case of no success, here is a human-readable error reason.
string error_message

RelocalizeFromGNSS.description: This service requests re-localization using the next GNSS message.
RelocalizeFromGNSS.raw:
# This service requests re-localization using the next GNSS message.

# Request.
# No data needed.
---
# Result. False if there was no MOLA localization module
# accepting this request.
bool accepted

RelocalizeNearPose.description: This service requests re-localization around a given pose.
RelocalizeNearPose.raw:
# This service requests re-localization around a given pose.

# Request
geometry_msgs/PoseWithCovarianceStamped pose
---
# Result. False if there was no MOLA localization module
# accepting this request.
bool accepted
